scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix web/backend && npm install --prefix web/frontend && npm install --prefix mobile
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix web/backend" "npm run dev --prefix web/frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,MOBILE" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green" "npm run dev --prefix web/backend" "npm run dev --prefix web/frontend" "npm start --prefix mobile"
scripts.db:push: npm run --prefix web/backend prisma db push
